title: British Fried Chicken Bites with Spicy Tangy Rice
description: Crispy fried chicken bites paired with a flavorful spicy rice dish inspired by British cuisine.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, mix together chicken pieces, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat the molten oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
3. Fry the chicken pieces in batches until golden brown and cooked through.
4. Drain the fried chicken on paper towels.
5. Cook the tangy rice according to package instructions.
6. In a separate pan, heat the fried rice seasoning over low heat.
7. Add the cooked rice to the pan and stir-fry until combined.
8. Serve the fried chicken bites with the spicy tangy rice.
9. Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
10. Enjoy your delicious British Fried Chicken Bites with Spicy Tangy Rice!
